lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹੈ ਅਤੀਤੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਲੇ ਊਪਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: rahai ateet guramat le aoopar har nirbhau kai ghar paaeaa |6|
lines.english: One who receives the Guru's Teachings, and remains aloof and detached, obtains a place in the home of the Fearless Lord. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਸਮੁੰਦੁ ਅਥਾਹੁ ਮਹਾ ਬਿਖੁ ਭਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ehu samund athaahu mahaa bikh bhariaa |
lines.english: This ocean is vast and unfathomable; it is overflowing with the worst poison.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਜਾਇ ਨ ਤਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sach bin bhavajal jaae na tariaa |
lines.english: Without the Truth, the terrifying world-ocean cannot be crossed.
False is the cleverness of loving attachment to the world.
In no time at all, it comes and goes.
In creation and destruction, they are bound in bondage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ਚਲਹਿ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੀ ਉਪਜੈ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਖਪਾਇਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naam visaar chaleh abhimaanee upajai binas khapaaeaa |7|
lines.english: Forgetting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the proud egotistical people depart; in creation and destruction they are wasted away. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸੋ ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਬੰਧਿ ਚਲਾਇਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jis raam naam naahee mat guramat so jam pur bandh chalaaeaa |8|
lines.english: Whoever does not accept the Guru's Teachings, and does not dwell upon the Lord's Name, is bound and bagged, and dragged into the City of Death. ||8||
The noose of egotism and Maya is around their necks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਿਉ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur raam naam kiau dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: Without the Guru, how can anyone meditate on the Lord's Name?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਮੋਖ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਿਉ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: gur bin mokh mukat kiau paaeeai |
lines.english: Without the Guru, how can anyone be emancipated or liberated?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਤਰਹੁ ਭਵ ਦੁਤਰੁ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਭਏ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: guramat lehu tarahu bhav dutar mukat bhe sukh paaeaa |9|
lines.english: Accepting the Guru's Teachings, cross over the arduous, terrifying world-ocean; you shall be emancipated, and find peace. ||9||
Through the Guru's Teachings, Krishna lifted up the mountain of Govardhan.
Through the Guru's Teachings, Rama floated stones across the ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਿ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: guramat lehu param pad paaeeai naanak gur bharam chukaaeaa |10|
lines.english: Accepting the Guru's Teachings, the supreme status is obtained; O Nanak, the Guru eradicates doubt. ||10||
Accepting the Guru's Teachings, cross over to the other side through Truth.
O soul, remember the Lord within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਕੇ ਫਾਹੇ ਕਾਟਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਅਕੁਲ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: jam ke faahe kaatteh har jap akul niranjan paaeaa |11|
lines.english: The noose of death is cut away, meditating on the Lord; you shall obtain the Immaculate Lord, who has no ancestry. ||11||
Through the Guru's Teachings, the Holy become one's friends and Siblings of Destiny.
Through the Guru's Teachings, the inner fire is subdued and extinguished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਜਗਜੀਵਨ ਰਿਦ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਇਆ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: man mukh naam japahu jagajeevan rid antar alakh lakhaaeaa |12|
lines.english: Chant the Naam with your mind and mouth; know the unknowable Lord, the Life of the World, deep within the nucleus of your heart. ||12||
Who does he praise or slander?
The Gurmukh understands, and is pleased with the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੀਨਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਜਗਦੀਸਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਗੰਨਾਥੁ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: cheenahu aap japahu jagadeesar har jaganaath man bhaaeaa |13|
lines.english: Know yourself, and meditate on the Lord of the Universe; let your mind be pleased with the Lord, the Master of the Universe. ||13||
Know the One who pervades all the realms of the universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਭੋਗੇ ਭੋਗਣਹਾਰਾ ਰਹੈ ਅਤੀਤੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt bhoge bhoganahaaraa rahai ateet sabaaeaa |14|
lines.english: The Enjoyer enjoys each and every heart, and yet He remains detached from all. ||14||
Through the Guru's Teachings, chant the Pure Praises of the Lord.
As Gurmukh, understand and realize the Shabad.
Through the Guru's Teachings, behold the lofty Lord with your eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰਵਣੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਣੈ ਹਰਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰੰਗਾਇਆ ॥੧੫॥੩॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: sravanee naam sunai har baanee naanak har rang rangaaeaa |15|3|20|
lines.english: Whoever listens to the Lord's Name, and the Word of His Bani, O Nanak, is imbued with the color of the Lord's Love. ||15||3||20||
Renounce greed and possessiveness, and become carefree.
Leave behind sexual desire, anger and the slander of others.
Maaroo, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮ ਕਾ ਸੰਗਲੁ ਤੋੜਿ ਨਿਰਾਲਾ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhram kaa sangal torr niraalaa har antar har ras paaeaa |1|
lines.english: Break the chains of doubt, and remain unattached; you shall find the Lord, and the Lord's sublime essence, deep within yourself. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਸਿ ਦਾਮਨਿ ਜਿਉ ਚਮਕਿ ਚੰਦਾਇਣੁ ਦੇਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: nis daaman jiau chamak chandaaein dekhai |
lines.english: As one sees the flash of lightning in the night,
see the Divine Light deep within your nucleus, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨੰਦ ਰੂਪੁ ਅਨੂਪੁ ਸਰੂਪਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਦੇਖਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aanand roop anoop saroopaa gur poorai dekhaaeaa |2|
lines.english: The Lord, the embodiment of bliss, incomparably beautiful, reveals the Perfect Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਿ ਅਦਿਸਟੁ ਰਹਹੁ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ਸਭੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dekh adisatt rahahu liv laagee sabh tribhavan braham sabaaeaa |3|
lines.english: See the invisible Lord, and remain absorbed in loving devotion. God is all throughout the three worlds. ||3||
So meet with the True Guru, and God Himself will save you.
He placed the lamps of the sun and the moon in the home of the sky.
The state of inspired illumination is obtained, and self-conceit is eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਏ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਭਉ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: amrit ras paae trisanaa bhau jaae |
lines.english: Obtaining the sublime ambrosial essence, desire and fear are dispelled.
The Naam, the Name of the invisible and unfathomable Lord, is infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚੀ ਪਦਵੀ ਊਚੋ ਊਚਾ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aoochee padavee aoocho aoochaa niramal sabad kamaaeaa |4|
lines.english: The lofty and exalted state, the highest of the high is obtained, practicing the immaculate Word of the Shabad. ||4||
